labels.name: build docs

title: A couple of bugixes for the bathymetry module

body:
This PR refactors the computation of atmosphere-ocean fluxes. We have two main objectives:

1. Reduce the GPU parameter space used by the flux computation, resolving #116 
2. Pave the way for the implementation of two solver "modes": the current mode, which solves for turbulent fluxes only, and a second mode that solves for both surface fluxes and surface temperature, given either a value or a model for heat flux arriving at the surface from the interior. The second mode will be used by the sea ice model, and also potentially the ocean model in the future with an updated parameterization for surface temperature / surface fluxes.

Right now I only made the smallest change to the flux calculation to test its effect on parameter space usage. I've also added a file to test parameter space usage which could be added to the test infrastructure (I'm confused whether this will properly test parameter space usage if we run it in our typical caltech cluster queue or not).
title: Refactor atmosphere-ocean flux computation
